objective: Phase 2.5 of CODEREF-CORE pipeline refactor. Implement canonical semantic header parser per BNF in analyze-coderef-semantics/SKILL.md. Every source file walked produces a HeaderFact and a headerStatus. @layer validates against STANDARDS/layers.json at runtime. @exports cross-checks against AST-derived RawExportFact[]. Replace Phase 2's RawHeaderImportFact placeholders with structured HeaderImportFact records. Hard-stop before Phase 3 (resolution).

in: BNF parser implementation in src/pipeline/semantic-header-parser.ts (pure function, no IO)
HeaderFact + HeaderImportFact + HeaderParseError type definitions in src/pipeline/header-fact.ts
Runtime @layer validation against STANDARDS/layers.json via element-taxonomy.ts (fails closed on enum drift)
@exports cross-check against RawExportFact[] from same file
headerStatus state transitions: defined / stale / partial / missing
Replace RawHeaderImportFact placeholders with structured HeaderImportFact records
Additive projection seam edit (rawFacts + headerFact + headerStatus on registry items)

8 new test files: header-fact-shape, header-layer-runtime-validation (invariant), header-tag-validation, header-exports-cross-check (integration), header-status-states, header-parser-purity (invariant), header-import-facts, no-import-resolution (invariant — Phase 3 boundary enforcer)
out: Grammar changes (BNF in analyze-coderef-semantics/SKILL.md is canonical)
Hardcoding @layer enum in TypeScript (must be runtime load via element-taxonomy.ts)
Removal of deprecated RawHeaderImportFact (Phase 3 removes it; Phase 2.5 only deprecates it)
Making the Phase 0 ground-truth tests pass (those become green in Phase 3/4, NOT Phase 2.5)

hard_constraints: Phase 2.5 hard-stops before Phase 3 / Phase 6. Do not begin resolver or strict-gate work in this WO.
Header parsing must be a pure function — no file IO, no AST mutation, no side effects.
Header parsing must be idempotent — same input always produces same HeaderFact.
@layer enum loaded at runtime from STANDARDS/layers.json via element-taxonomy.ts. NEVER hardcoded.
@imports resolution MUST NOT be attempted (enforced by no-import-resolution.test.ts invariant).
Phase 0 ground-truth tests MUST CONTINUE TO FAIL for original reasons.
Projection seam edits ADDITIVE only — no field renames or removals.
Phase 1 (taxonomy) + Phase 2 (raw facts) tests must continue to pass.
ground_truth_test_disposition: Per roadmap and Phase 2 prep adjudication: the 6 Phase 0 ground-truth tests do NOT pass in Phase 2.5 either. Phase 2.5 produces structured HeaderFacts from comments; resolution (which the tests check) lands in Phase 3 (@imports resolution) and Phase 4 (call resolution). If any ground-truth test flips to PASS during Phase 2.5 execution, that is a regression in Phase 2.5's discipline — halt and report.

predecessor_artifacts.raw_header_import_fact_placeholder: src/pipeline/types.ts (Phase 2 placeholder, deprecated by this WO)
